reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.text:
This is probably one of the worst hotels I’ve stayed in Asia and I’ve stayed in many. Customer service is nonexistent, this is a ‘high volume tour operator’ operated hotel with low grade service and little interest in westerners staying or there needs. They advertise restaurants are open from 6am - 10pm this simply isn’t true. They’re all closed and only provide breakfast buffet between 6am - 9.30am westerners are being very much being mislead and overcharged in the stay here. 

It certainly isn’t a 4* hotel, rooms are cleaned although bed linens are not changed daily. Reception staff are neither informative or engaging, in fact all staff display a culture that lacks discipline and would rather engage each other in conversation than provide any level of service to guests, the breakfast buffet sittings is are a very good example of this.

The higher floors of the hotel appear to have been flooded at some point, which in turn run into the lower floors while the room I stayed in appears to have been rectified. The communal areas have not and corridors smell damp and the cleanliness isn’t consistent with a 4* graded hotel. 

Here three days now and it’s been consistent throughout, quite disappointed to be honest.
Unfortunately I wouldn’t recommend this hotel to any western guests.

reviews.title: This is a good and comfortable hotel, highly recommended for families or groups.
reviews.positives:

We had a bit of an unpleasant experience during check-in, but the management team solved the problem in a professional way, so we had a good experience during our stay here.
reviews.negatives: Room preparation was not smooth. The receptionists need to be friendlier and interact more with guests.

reviews.title: Reflection
reviews.text:
I stayed here on February 6, 2025. When checking in, the staff informed me that the room I booked on the fifth floor had no windows (I had asked very carefully whether there were windows or not). To upgrade to a room with a window, there would be an additional charge of 100,000 VND. I have been using the Mường Thanh system for over 10 years and have never seen a Mường Thanh hotel without windows. When I raised my concerns with the management staff at Mường Thanh Luxury Nhật Lệ, I received an unsatisfactory explanation. Another issue was that the breakfast here that day was very poor. It was sparse and colder than previous breakfasts I had at the Mường Thanh system. The fried goby fish had a lot of sand in it. The staff said that it was due to the fish’s intestines containing sand. I think if the fish cannot be cleaned properly, it should not be on the menu. 
Above are some of my concerns. Sincerely!
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Mr Tran, 

Thay mặt toàn thể nhân viên khách sạn, chúng tôi xin được cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn sử dụng dịch vụ khách sạn! 

Nhằm mục đích nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ, chúng tôi rất mong muốn nhận được các phản hồi của quý khách hàng và rất cảm ơn những phản hồi của Anh về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.

Chúng tôi cũng rất lấy làm tiếc về vấn đề truyền tải thông tin của nhân viên lễ tân khách sạn về phòng nghỉ và món cá bống trong menu buffet sáng mà Anh đã gặp phải khiến Anh chưa được hài lòng. Khách sạn xin ghi nhận và chân thành xin lỗi Anh về trải nghiệm chưa được tốt này. Rất mong Anh thông cảm về các thiếu sót trên. 

Ban Giám đốc khách sạn đã cùng làm việc với các bộ phận liên quan để kiểm tra lại, nhắc nhở và khắc phục không để ảnh hưởng đến dịch vụ và chất lượng của khách sạn.

reviews.title: Sehr schöner Urlaub.
reviews.positives: Dong Hoi ist ein wunderbarer Urlaubsort, den bislang nur wenige ausländische Touristen besuchen.  Am Strand direkt vor dem Hotel darf man nicht schwimmen. Dort gibt es auch keine Liegen. Für Liegen und Schirme geht man ca. 15 Minuten links den Strand runter. Eine Liege mit Schirm kostet 25.000 Dong. Direkt am Strand gibt es eine Vielzahl von kleinen Restaurants die hauptsächlich Fisch und Meeresfrüchte in guter Qualität anbieten. Das Frühstück im Hotel war auch sehr gut.
reviews.negatives: Direkt am Hotel sind Massagen, Reinigung etc. rechr teuer. Aber für 30.000 Dong kann man in die Stadt fahren, wo die Preise sehr günstig sind.

reviews.title: Pretty good facilities, unhelpful staff
reviews.text:
Pros: the room is large and quite new. Beautiful view.  Spacious lounge.

Cons: the location is ok but not great. It is far from nearest beach where it is allowed to swim. The staff is not helpful, or maybe it is the  hotel management's policy: they do not allow early check-in regardless of room availability. 2pm sharp, not a minute earlier.  I almost forgot to mention I'm a VIP user of Agoda and it said on the Agoda booking confirmation that "VIP only - Early check in (up to 2 hours and upon availability)". 
 Apparently their ultimate aim is to make money (there's nothing wrong with that) but in the process it's not about satisfying as many customers as possible. I don't think I will come back here.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Thanh,
Greetings from all staff of Muong Thanh Nhat Le Hotel
Thank you for staying and taking the time to give us feedback
We have received your feedback about early check-in time at the hotel
With Agoda's VIP, the hotel always prioritizes the accompanying benefits, however, July is the hight season, and the hotel will arrange early check-in if availability. In the booking confirmation of Agoda's also clearly stated
Hope you understand and sympathize with the hight season at the hotel
Wishing you and your family good health
Thanks so much
Mr Cao Xuan Tien - General Manager

Cons: Breakfast was the same everyday we stayed there. The beach in front of the hotel cannot be swum so we have to either walk or take a taxi to the public beach where you have to pay for everything such as chair, umbrella and water... Hotel should offer electric car to deliver us there instead. 
The staff at the swimming pool yells at the kids all the time for not allowing them to enter 1.2m or 1.5m depth even though they can swim.
Pro: Deluxe sea view room is great. The bed is comfort. The price is reasonable. 
We will return if we get the same price and have transport to the beach.

Trân trọng cảm ơn!

but the staff is super nice.

reviews.title: Slightly disappointed considering the high price
reviews.text:
Overall we enjoyed our stay. However, there are things that I was unsatisfied with:
• The room didn’t have enough lighting. Just two small bulbs hidden under the tray ceiling, plus two bed lamps, leaving the room so dark and gloomy at night. We gathered to play family games but had to stop cuz it was too dark.
• The wifi is TERRIBLE. At ~1m/night, I expected the wifi to be fast, or at least working.
• Breakfast buffet is just meh.

Otherwise, it was good. Good location, I really loved the great view to the beach and the small lake. Rooms were clean and staff were nice. The hotel looked new and luxurious. Please note that you’d have to walk ~700m or take a “tuk-tuk” to the swimming area though.

reviews.title: Spacious hotel, great views, good breakfast spread
reviews.text:
The hotel is located at the edge of town but taxi fares to town or airport are reasonable. The location meant food & shopping options are limited but also more peace and quiet from the loud, live performances/entertainment in town itself.

We were greatly impressed by the huge and luxurious lobby. Our room on the 8th floor was spacious with river/sea views. The lighthouse at the river mouth is nearby but the lights are not distracting.

There is a glass panel between the bathroom and bed area but a roller blind is there to restore privacy when needed.

We stayed here during a cold snap, toward the end of the cool (low) season. This ruled out any beach activities as the seas were rough and the winds were strong & chilly. There is no direct access to the beach though; you'll need to cross two roads to get to it. The swimming pool is also located in the neighboring hotel of the same chain, though I reckon that they've just kept one pool open for the low season

The check-in process was smooth and the hotel staff were generally pleasant.

The buffet breakfast afforded a great selection of both Western & Vietnamese foods.Seating is adequate although they do not strictly enforce against smoking in the dining area; you have been warned.
reviews.response:
Dear Our Value Guest, 
Warmest greetings from Muong Thanh Luxury Nhat Le Hotel! We are happy to hear that you enjoyed your stay. We are glad that we could satisfy your expectations. It is always our ambition to make your stay as pleasant and comfortable as possible. 
Thank you for your staying at Muong Thanh Luxury Nhat Le Hotel.
Best regards

The cleanliness, location, and overall view are absolutely stunning, adding to the charm of the place. I highly recommend this hotel over others, and if I were to visit the city again, it would undoubtedly be my first choice without a second thought. The overall experience left a lasting impression, and I couldn’t ask for more.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest, 
Firstly of all, we would like to express our thankfullness for being our guests. Moreover, your evaluation to our services are so adorable. We love to know that our guest had enjoyed their stays and always aim to get such feelings. We will always pay attention to maintain the quality and can't wait to your next trip. Best Regard, General Manager

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: A wonderful place to stay. Although my wife and I arrived by motorbike (rented from the airport), the reception staff welcomed us warmly, unlike the attitude of most employees in hotels in the Cam Ranh area. Particularly, the two young security guards, one male and one female, were very cheerful, always smiling, and even helped us with our motorbike. The location is quite convenient, just a 10-minute ride from the airport; our room had a south-facing view overlooking the Nhat Le Bridge, the coastal road, and the beautiful Nhat Le Bridge. Although there were few guests during the week, the breakfast buffet still ensured a good variety of dishes, and my wife really enjoyed the beef noodle soup. If we return to Quang Binh, Mường Thanh Nhat Le will definitely be the place we choose. Thank you very much to the hotel for making our trip wonderful and complete!
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Quý khách,
Lời đầu tiên, xin thay mặt Ban Giám đốc khách sạn Mường Thanh Luxury Nhật Lệ gửi đến Quý khách lời cảm ơn sâu sắc nhất vì đã tin tưởng lựa chọn và sử dụng dịch vụ tại khách sạn chúng tôi.
Những lời góp ý tích cực của Quý khách thật sự được đánh giá cao và là động lực to lớn giúp khách sạn chúng tôi ngày càng phát triển và hoàn thiện chất lượng dịch vụ ngày càng tốt hơn nữa. 
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi rất vinh dự vì Quý khách đã lựa chọn khách sạn Mường Thanh Luxury Nhật Lệ và thật hân hạnh khi chúng tôi lại có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách trong kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo nhé.

The location is convenient for travel, with a bustling night market right in front.

There is only one thing to note: the swimmable beach is 400m from the hotel.

The computers in the lobby on the first floor were broken, so the staff lent me a notebook to complete the re-evaluation, and as a result, I passed. It was an urgent situation where I had to complete the re-evaluation within 72 hours of the results being released, and the staff kindly helped me, leading to a good outcome. ^^

Hotel location: opposite the beach, but not in a dining area, so it was quiet and a bit lonely; we had to use an electric car to get anywhere. 
The hotel room was extremely spacious and comfortable, with full and clean amenities. 
The staff were very nice; I have a baby, and any requests were warmly supported by them. 
The breakfast, while not having too many dishes (maybe because it wasn't peak tourist season), was sufficient with a decent variety of Western and Asian options. 
Overall, the hotel is worth it for the money spent!
